case_title: THATIANA MARCHI REISIG VS. CITY GARDENS 333 LLC

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CITY GARDENS 333 LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REISIG, THATIANA MARCHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY GARDENS 333 LLC $2,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,275.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED APR-04-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY GARDENS 333 LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,250.00 FILED BY REISIG, THATIANA MARCHI AS TO DEFENDANT CITY GARDENS 333 LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY GARDENS 333 LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF THATIANA MARCHI REISIG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY GARDENS 333 LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DESIREE MENDOZA, PORTFOLIO MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2022 - JUDGMENT.
